raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The abstract makes several causal and comparative claims (e.g., GPT-4o assigns 11.3% higher win rates; JudgeFix reduces bias from 11.3% to 1.9%); checking whether the blinded-protocol design actually isolates the claimed effect and whether intermediate inferences hold is a plausible central ask when reviewing a research excerpt.","R1.3":"The abstract reports specific numeric results (Bradley-Terry scores, Cohen's κ of 0.81, regression proportions from rationale text) and asserts they support both the bias finding and the debiasing claim; verifying that stated numbers and the described experimental setup adequately back those assertions is a core concern for any substantive 'look' at a research passage.","R1.6":"The most colloquial meaning of 'take a look at this paragraph' is a prose and clarity review — sentence flow, terminology consistency, paragraph cohesion, and readability are all plausible primary targets, especially given the artifact is a polished abstract."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I focus primarily on writing quality and prose clarity, or on whether the empirical claims and experimental design are logically sound and well-supported by the reported evidence?"}

rationale.R1.2: The abstract makes several causal and comparative claims (e.g., GPT-4o assigns 11.3% higher win rates; JudgeFix reduces bias from 11.3% to 1.9%); checking whether the blinded-protocol design actually isolates the claimed effect and whether intermediate inferences hold is a plausible central ask when reviewing a research excerpt.
rationale.R1.3: The abstract reports specific numeric results (Bradley-Terry scores, Cohen's κ of 0.81, regression proportions from rationale text) and asserts they support both the bias finding and the debiasing claim; verifying that stated numbers and the described experimental setup adequately back those assertions is a core concern for any substantive 'look' at a research passage.
rationale.R1.6: The most colloquial meaning of 'take a look at this paragraph' is a prose and clarity review — sentence flow, terminology consistency, paragraph cohesion, and readability are all plausible primary targets, especially given the artifact is a polished abstract.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus primarily on writing quality and prose clarity, or on whether the empirical claims and experimental design are logically sound and well-supported by the reported evidence?
